room_description: Una taberna subterranea iluminada por antorchas. El aire calido huele a cerveza rancia y estofado. Bancos de madera rodean mesas tosca.

floor.texture_prompt: worn wooden plank floor, dark stained, tavern, seamless tiling

ceiling.texture_prompt: low wooden beam ceiling, dark smoke stained, medieval tavern

walls.texture_prompt: rough plastered wall with mounted deer antlers, tavern
stone wall with wooden shelves, bottles and mugs
wooden wall with iron-studded door frame
rough stone wall with faded wanted posters

exits.description: heavy oak door to the street

objects.texture_prompt: rough hewn wooden tavern table, dark stained
objects.description: mesa de madera tosca con marcas de cuchillo

objects.texture_prompt: wooden tavern table with spilled drink stains
objects.description: mesa con manchas de bebida derramada

objects.texture_prompt: large ale barrel on wooden stand, tavern
objects.description: barril grande de cerveza sobre soporte de madera

objects.model_prompt: stone fireplace with burning logs, medieval fantasy
objects.description: chimenea de piedra con lenos ardiendo

npcs.name: Greta
npcs.sprite_prompt: stout female barkeeper, apron, braided hair, friendly face, dark fantasy, pixel art
npcs.description: mujer robusta con delantal y trenzas, limpia un vaso con expresion cansada
npcs.dialogue_hint: Conoce los rumores del pueblo y vende suministros basicos

ambient_event: El crepitar del fuego se mezcla con el murmullo de conversaciones lejanas.
